bird.name: 环颈鸻
bird.summary: 环颈鸻（学名：Anarhynchus alexandrinus）为鸻科弯嘴鸻属的鸟类，又名东方环颈鸻，曾被分类在鸻属。该物种的模式产地在埃及。 東方環頸鴴是一種小型涉禽 （40—44 g（1.4—1.6 oz）），屬於鴴科，主要在鹽湖、潟湖和海岸繁殖，並棲息於沙丘、沼澤、半乾旱…

locations.name: 匈牙利
locations.summary: 匈牙利（匈牙利語：Magyarország，發音：[ˈmɒɟɒrorsaːɡ] ）是位於歐洲的内陆国家。根據地理分區的不同定義，匈牙利被認為處在中歐和東歐。北鄰斯洛伐克，東北鄰烏克蘭，東和東南鄰羅馬尼亞，南鄰塞爾維亞，西南鄰克羅地亞，西鄰…

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

locations.name: 希腊
locations.summary: 希臘共和國（希臘語：Ελληνική Δημοκρατία，羅馬化：Ellinikí Dimokratía），簡稱希臘（Ελλάδα，羅馬化：Elláda），是位於歐洲南部的發達跨大陸國家。2024年其人口為1,039萬。雅典為希臘首都及…

relations.subject: 环颈鸻
relations.evidence: PLoS ONE 8(4 In Europe, populations are typically found in the west; although there was once a breeding population in Hungary, Kentish plovers no longer breed there

relations.subject: 环颈鸻
relations.evidence: It is a rare vagrant in Australia. Some populations do not migrate, such as the Maio (Cape Verde) population, however other populations can migrate reasonable distances, for example, plovers that spend winter in North Africa have been known to migrate to Turkey and Greece in the spring

relations.subject: 环颈鸻
relations.evidence: The breeding habitats are most commonly alkali lake shores, wetlands, salt marshes, and coastland, which is fitting with the results of a study that investigated what makes an environment suitable for a breeding habitat for the Kentish plover
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: 环颈鸻
relations.evidence: The breeding habitats are most commonly alkali lake shores, wetlands, salt marshes, and coastland, which is fitting with the results of a study that investigated what makes an environment suitable for a breeding habitat for the Kentish plover
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 环颈鸻
relations.evidence: A major threat to this species is habitat loss and disturbance
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 环颈鸻

relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

relations.subject: 环颈鸻
relations.evidence: Unpublished Fieldwork Report, University of Bath Global warming and climate change also plays a role in the decline of areas available for plovers to breed and reside in
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
